name: V2 - Sync Boss Sheets to Property Registry - Module 1D All Tabs

nodes.name: Read Boss - Sales HDB
nodes.notes: READ ONLY node. Use Google credential connected to jameskoh.kjk@gmail.com. Boss sheets should remain Viewer-only.

nodes.name: Normalise - Sales HDB
nodes.notes: Processes all rows where Clarity Route is not blank and not No. Normalises source tab fields into Property Registry schema.

nodes.name: Upsert Registry - Sales HDB
nodes.notes: Duplicate-safe upsert. Matches on Source Key. Appends if new, updates if existing.

meta.description: Clarity V2 Module 1D. Reads all 8 boss sheet tabs, filters by Clarity Route, normalises fields, and duplicate-safe upserts into Clarity V2 Property Registry using Source Key.
